mapper.insert: insert ignore into sys_msg_read (msg_id, user_id, read_time) values (#{msgId}, #{userId}, #{readTime})

insert ignore into sys_msg_read (msg_id, user_id, read_time) values
(#{item.msgId}, #{item.userId}, #{item.readTime})
mapper.select: select count(1) from sys_msg m where m.del_flag = '0' and (m.target_type = 'all' or (m.target_type = 'user' and find_in_set(#{userId}, m.target_id) > 0) or (m.target_type = 'role' and exists ( select 1 from sys_user_role ur join sys_role r on r.role_id = ur.role_id where ur.user_id = #{userId} and r.role_key = m.target_role collate utf8mb4_general_ci ))) and not exists (select 1 from sys_msg_read r where r.msg_id = m.msg_id and r.user_id = #{userId})
